CREATE TABLE array_test1 (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO array_test1 VALUES (['a', 'b', 'c'], [1, 2, 3]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2) FROM array_test1;
CREATE TABLE array_test2 (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO array_test2 VALUES ([1, 2], [10, 20, 30]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2) FROM array_test2;
CREATE TABLE array_test3 (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Float32));
INSERT INTO array_test3 VALUES (['x', 'y'], [1, 2, 3], [0.1, 0.2]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2, arr3) FROM array_test3;
CREATE TABLE array_test4 (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Boolean));
INSERT INTO array_test4 VALUES (['first'], [1, 2], [true, false, true]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2, arr3) FROM array_test4;
CREATE TABLE array_test5 (arr1 Array(Date), arr2 Array(UInt64));
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2) FROM array_test5;
CREATE TABLE array_test6 (arr1 Array(Float64), arr2 Array(String));
INSERT INTO array_test6 VALUES ([1.1, 2.2, 3.3], ['a', 'b']);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2) FROM array_test6;
CREATE TABLE array_test7 (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO array_test7 VALUES ([1, 2, 3], [4, 5], [6]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2, arr3) FROM array_test7;
CREATE TABLE array_test8 (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO array_test8 VALUES ([1], [2, 3, 4]);
SELECT arrayZipUnaligned(arr1, arr2) FROM array_test8;
